entity.name: jMonkeyEngine
entity.description: jMonkeyEngine allows developers to create games and other 3D visualisation software for Windows, Linux, Mac, Android and the web. The engine includes a powerful scene graph api, custom shader support, physics, GUI, networking and more. jMonkeyEngine also hosts a large ecosystem of community supported libraries and extensions that further expand the capabilities of the engine.
